title: 異国の地ならなんでも

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh... It looks like they're not running that mystery
game we played any longer.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I hope I can have another fun experience
like that somewhere.
choice_data_list: Shall we go on a little outing, then?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Can we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is our day off, after all. I decide to take her to a
sightseeing spot so she can have more memorable
experiences.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! A mountain that has a great view of the
sunset? How wonderful! Are we almost at the
station?
choice_data_list: I think ours is the next one.
I think ours is the next one.

text_block_list.name: Train Announcement
text_block_list.text:
We are approaching the last stop. Please mind
your footing when exiting the train...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh? The last stop?
choice_data_list: Oh no, this is the express train!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! So it is! It's just flying through these
stations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we do end up making it to our
destination, it takes us until past noon.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, the timing is pretty perfect for a late lunch,
so let's have one! Besides, I really want to try
some local delicacies.
choice_data_list: I know a great place. Follow me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Closed today so I can go support my favorite
Umamusume." It looks like the manager took the
day off.
choice_data_list:
S-sorry about that! But just wait until you see
the next place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bouncing back from the hitch in our plans, we
stop to take in a few sights and finally arrive at
the mountain summit. However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Goodness! What a beautiful view of the stars!
choice_data_list: But I wanted you to see the sunset!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I suppose we'll just have to come back another
time for that! For now, though, let's just enjoy this
moment! ♪
choice_data_list:
Y-yeah. We might as well take a picture to
remember the day...

Y-yeah. We might as well take a picture to
remember the day...

text_block_list.name: Monkey
text_block_list.text: Ooh ooh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment I take my phone out for a picture, a
monkey swoops in and swipes it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, your phone! Captain, we've got to
retrieve it at once!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Right away!
Stop right there, you furry fiend!

text_block_list.name: Monkey
text_block_list.text: Eeeeee!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...What a day, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
First the train, then the restaurant being closed,
and top it off with that monkey business. I'm glad
we got your phone back, but it's a shame the
captain tore her suit.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah. Hehe. Sorry. It is just that I never would've
imagined an outing like this. How novel!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Phew. My duties have taken me to all sorts of
places, of course. And plenty of them were very
thrilling.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But even in my wildest dreams, I never imagined
an excursion as full of surprises as this!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In short, you've wowed me, Trainer. You shouldn't
be apologizing. On the contrary, you should be
holding your head up high. ♪
choice_data_list: I can't help feeling you're just being nice...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What? Of course not! But how do I convince
you...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's it! Look how many wonderful pictures
I've taken!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This one's the convenience store we stopped by
after we missed lunch! I got a real sense of
regional flavor from seeing all the local
products...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And this is the route we took when we were
pursuing that primate. There weren't any street
lights, so the starry night sky looked absolutely
massive... It was oddly soothing, actually!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
These are all memories now. And I wouldn't have
them if you hadn't brought me here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's not a matter of what you do. It's the thought
that goes into it, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion smiles as she explains her optimistic
outlook, and I feel somehow liberated. That said,
I still want to make our next outing even better,
for her sake.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's the ticket! You. Are. Amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I thank thee, my liege, for a most excellent time.
ONAAARI!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Whoops. That wasn't meant to be funny. Isn't that
what you say here in Japan?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Oh well. If it made you smile, that's good
enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I bet I'll have more fascinating experiences if we
go on another outing together. So, until then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she offers up those kind words in such a jovial
mood, I find myself wanting to ensure that our
next experience is genuinely fun in the traditional
sense.
